contactCTA.title: Bring AI-Powered Analytics Into Your APEX Applications

list.question: How is ASKLYZE deployed?
list.answer: We offer two deployment models: 'On-Premise' for complete data sovereignty (ideal for government/banking sectors) hosted on your servers, and 'SaaS' via ORDS REST API for rapid deployment in multi-tenant cloud environments on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI).

list.question: What visualization options are available?
list.answer: ASKLYZE offers 22+ chart types powered by ECharts, including Combo Charts and Multi-Series support. The system also includes dynamic Pivot tables (WebDataRocks) for cross-analysis and AI-generated narratives that explain statistical insights.

list.question: Does it support Arabic language queries?
list.answer: Yes. ASKLYZE has deep semantic understanding of Arabic, including regional financial and administrative terminology. The interface and query processing fully support both Arabic and English.

list.question: Is it compatible with my Oracle version?
list.answer: Yes, ASKLYZE is fully compatible with Oracle 19c and ready for the advanced capabilities of Oracle 23ai, ensuring long-term infrastructure sustainability for decades to come.

list.question: How does the 3-step configuration work?
list.answer: Step 1: Whitelist your schemas and tables (supporting 1000+ tables). Step 2: Automatic metadata analysis identifies relationships and Foreign Keys for optimized joins. Step 3: Generate AI descriptions to provide business context beyond technical names.

list.question: How does Intent Detection improve accuracy?
list.answer: Our advanced NLP engine automatically classifies queries as REPORT (detailed tabular data), ANALYTICS (calculations and comparisons), or TRENDING (temporal patterns). This ensures the perfect response format and visualization for each question type.

list.question: Can it handle large-scale databases?
list.answer: Yes. ASKLYZE can process complex schemas with 1000+ tables and thousands of columns simultaneously. The metadata grounding process ensures accurate join operations and eliminates AI hallucination risks.

list.question: How fast is the response time?
list.answer: Most queries return results in under 2 seconds. The system eliminates the traditional IT request cycle (which takes days) and provides instant insights through natural language questions.

list.question: Does my data leave the server?
list.answer: Absolutely not. Our 'Zero Data Movement' architecture ensures that AI acts only as a logic layer that translates natural language to SQL. All queries execute locally within your Oracle environment, and your core business data remains 100% under your control.

list.question: What security measures are in place?
list.answer: ASKLYZE integrates with Oracle VPD and Row-Level Security (RLS), ensuring users only see authorized data. All communications use HTTPS/TLS encryption, and every query is logged in ASKLYZE_AI_QUERY_STORE for compliance auditing and performance monitoring.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How We Protect Your Data
privacy.intro: Asklyze uses AI to analyze your data, uncover hidden patterns, and help you make smarter decisions faster — without complexity.

sections.title: 1. Zero Data Movement Architecture
sections.content: ASKLYZE operates on a fundamental principle: your data never leaves your Oracle environment. Our AI engine acts solely as a logic layer, translating natural language queries into SQL, but all query execution happens locally within your database.

points.text: **Metadata**: Schema information, table structures, and relationships (for query optimization)
**Query Logs**: Questions asked and SQL queries generated (stored in local ASKLYZE_AI_QUERY_STORE)
**Usage Analytics**: Statistical patterns to improve performance (anonymized and aggregated)
**Account Information**: User credentials and access roles (for authentication purposes only)
Raw business data or actual rows from your database
Personally Identifiable Information (PII) of your customers
Financial data or transaction records
Sensitive information stored in your tables
**Query Processing**: To convert your questions into accurate SQL queries
**Performance Optimization**: To improve AI accuracy and responsiveness over time
**Audit & Compliance**: To provide logs for security monitoring and compliance tracking
**Technical Support**: To assist with troubleshooting and service improvements

sections.title: 5. Data Residency and Sovereignty
sections.content: For On-Premise deployments, all data remains within your data centers. For SaaS deployments via ORDS, only metadata is processed, and we comply with data residency requirements as specified in your agreement.

points.text: HTTPS/TLS encryption for all communications
Integration with Oracle VPD and Row-Level Security (RLS)
Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
Comprehensive auditing in ASKLYZE_AI_QUERY_STORE

additionalSections.title: 7. Data Sharing and Third Parties
additionalSections.content: We do not sell, share, or disclose your data to third parties. Our AI service providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) receive only abstracted queries and schema information - never raw data.

additionalSections.title: 8. Data Retention
additionalSections.content: Query logs are stored locally in your database according to your retention policies. We retain aggregated metadata (anonymized) for up to 24 months for service improvement purposes.

points.text: **Access**: Review your query logs at any time
**Deletion**: Delete specific logs or your entire account
**Portability**: Export your data in machine-readable formats
**Opt-Out**: Opt out of aggregated metadata for service improvements

additionalSections.title: 10. Compliance
additionalSections.content: ASKLYZE is designed for GDPR, CCPA, SOC 2, and ISO 27001 compliance. For regulated sectors (healthcare, finance, government), On-Premise deployment ensures full sovereignty compliance.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For any privacy-related questions, contact our Data Protection Officer at:
contact.address: Office No. 43-44 - Al Fahidi, Dubai Bur Dubai, UAE

solutions.title: APEX Experts AI Solutions
solutions.description: We are a specialized Oracle APEX and enterprise AI team focused on building practical solutions for real business environments. Asklyze was created to reduce the complexity of querying data and to give teams faster, more direct access to insights within their existing systems.

whatWeBuild.title: What we build
whatWeBuild.subtitle: Asklyze combines performance, security, and simplicity for Oracle-driven teams.

points.text: Query data in Arabic and English.\nNo SQL needed.
Generate visuals that fit directly\ninto APEX apps.
Run queries on your Oracle database.\nNo data movement.

guides.title: What guides our work
guides.subtitle: We build products that prioritize reliability, clarity, and real-world usability.

cards.description: Your data stays private and fully controlled.

cards.description: Built for real use cases, not experiments.

cards.description: Simple workflows for faster data access.

cards.title: Global Ready

vision.description: To simplify how teams interact with data by embedding AI directly into Oracle APEX workflows.
